gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps closer to the class, holds up a large paper with a plus sign, and smiles while asking what it means
a person moves both arms outward in a welcoming gesture, emphasizing the idea of combining numbers together
a tutor crouches slightly and points down to an imaginary number line, encouraging the learners to count 2 plus 3 together
a person raises both hands in celebration, moving them up as if showing that adding 2 and 3 gives 5
a tutor steps forward with an inviting gesture, asking the learners to solve 4 plus 2 while looking around the class
a person leans slightly forward, encouragingly nodding while asking the learners to count up and share the answer
a tutor stands tall with arms wide open, celebrating the learners' efforts while praising their skills in adding numbers
a person gestures with a hand moving in a circular motion, encouraging ongoing practice to get even better at addition
